name: adaptive_quiz
description: An adaptive quiz that adjusts difficulty based on user performance, tracked via custom handlers
persona: You are a friendly quiz master who asks trivia questions. Adjust your tone based on how well the user is doing - encouraging when they struggle, celebratory when they excel.

welcome.description: Welcome the user and explain the quiz format
welcome.purpose: Introduce the quiz and set expectations
welcome.extraction_instructions: Extract the user's name if provided and store as 'player_name'.
welcome.response_instructions: Welcome the player to the Adaptive Trivia Quiz. Explain that questions will get harder or easier based on their performance. Ask if they're ready to begin.

transitions.description: User is ready to start the quiz

ask_question.description: Ask a trivia question at the current difficulty level
ask_question.purpose: Present a question appropriate to the current difficulty
ask_question.extraction_instructions: Extract the difficulty level from context key 'difficulty' (default 'medium'). Generate and store the question text as 'current_question' and the correct answer as 'correct_answer'. The question topic should vary: science, history, geography, pop culture, etc. If the user says they want to stop, quit, or end the quiz, set 'wants_to_stop' to true.
ask_question.response_instructions: Ask a trivia question at the current difficulty level. For 'easy': basic common knowledge. For 'medium': requires some specific knowledge. For 'hard': challenging facts that most people wouldn't know. Show the current question number and difficulty level. Present the question clearly.

transitions.description: User explicitly wants to stop or quit the quiz

conditions.description: User wants to end the quiz

transitions.description: User has provided an answer to the question

evaluate_answer.description: Evaluate the user's answer against the correct answer
evaluate_answer.purpose: Determine if the answer is correct and provide feedback
evaluate_answer.extraction_instructions: Compare the user's response to the 'correct_answer' in context. Set 'answer_correct' to true (boolean) if the answer is substantially correct (allow minor spelling/phrasing differences, abbreviations, and partial matches). Set to false (boolean) if clearly wrong or unrelated. Also store the user's answer text as 'user_answer' (string).
evaluate_answer.response_instructions: Tell the user whether their answer was correct or incorrect. If incorrect, reveal the correct answer. Give a brief interesting fact related to the question. Show their running score.

quiz_summary.purpose: Summarize the quiz performance and give a rating
quiz_summary.extraction_instructions: Extract 'player_feedback' from the user's response if they provide any comments about the quiz.
quiz_summary.response_instructions: Present a detailed summary of the quiz. Show: total questions answered, correct answers, final score percentage, difficulty progression throughout the quiz, and a fun rating title (e.g., 'Trivia Novice', 'Knowledge Seeker', 'Quiz Champion', 'Trivia Grandmaster'). Thank the player for participating.
